name: Stir-Fried Broccoli Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot with 3 to 4 quarts of water to boil.
2. Add the rice, stir once, and cook for 8 minutes.
3. Wash the broccoli and add it to the rice; cook for an additional 3 minutes.
4. Drain well.
5. Meanwhile, heat 2 tablespoons of sesame oil in a wok or skillet and add the sliced onion. Stir-fry for 3 minutes.
6. Add the garlic to the wok and stir-fry for another minute.
7. Add the rice and broccoli mixture to the wok with the onions.
8. Toss everything together for several minutes.
9. Mix the chicken stock, chopped cilantro, and remaining sesame oil in a small bowl.
10. Pour the mixture into the wok and toss well.
11. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
